## Mentioned Vault Files (outline only)
- `llm-planner/SKILL grill me.md`
  - Properties:
    - `name`: `grill-me`
    - `description`: `Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, list and then resolve each ambiguity or contradiction one-by-one. Use when user wants to stress-test a plan, get grilled on their design, or mentions "grill me".`

This section provides only paths and outlines. Use file tools only if you need the full contents or a specific line range.


Can you create this as a skill for yourself @SKILL grill me.md
